arts.ttl: Everton could have 'very happy Christmas' as Dan Friedkin makes £21m transfer play - Kieran Maguire
Club make contact with entourage of Everton player – Situation sounded out amidst competition
arts.sum: Beto started for Everton against Manchester United at the weekend, his first start in the Premier League season. The Portuguese did well in the final third, showing glimpses of his ability, even if he didn’t score. He was taken off later, as Everton picked up a heavy 4-0 defeat against Ruben Amorim’s side. The start The post Club make contact with entourage of Everton player – Situation sounded out amidst competition appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Noah's story: Everton and inclusive football made me happy again
arts.sum: "The opportunities that have come along for Noah since having his disability have been amazing and that's only been achieved by the help of the Premier League, Everton in the Community and Liverpool. And watching him in the thick of the action with his friends at one of the Premier League Disability Football Festivals this summer, it is hard to believe that it wasn't that long ago that Noah was using a wheelchair for 18 months.

arts.ttl: Tayla's story: The Wolves Foundation saved me
arts.sum: She is now a role model and an inspiration for other disability participants as a coach at the Wolves Foundation . For six years she had been suffering with Complex Regional Pain Syndrome (CRPS) in her leg, which left her in excruciating pain and unable to engage in everyday life.

arts.ttl: Everton and Liverpool supporters could be set for huge TV rule change
arts.sum: The blackout rule that currently exists in English football could be eradicated from the 2029-30 season onwards

arts.ttl: Everton takeover by Friedkin Group latest as crucial period approaches
arts.sum: The prospective new Everton owners are currently awaiting regulatory approval to complete

arts.ttl: Everton defender becomes transfer target for multiple clubs as contract ticks down
arts.sum: Michael Keane is about to enter the final six months of his Everton contract

arts.ttl: I feel the trait that saved Everton has gone and takeover must come soon
arts.sum: Michael Ball tackles the big issues at Goodison Park ahead of Everton's home games with Wolverhampton Wanderers and Liverpool

arts.ttl: Ashley Young eyes 'dream' FA Cup tie against son
arts.sum: Everton defender Ashley Young could be in for a dream family clash in the FA Cup third round when his side take on Peterborough United, where his 18-year-old son Tyler plays.
